input:
I'm defining permissions for a social media platform.
Requirements:
[
  "User can create a Post",
  "User can edit their own Post",
  "Admin can delete any Post"
]

Convert this into Cedar (schema + policies).

I'm designing access control for a blogging system.
Requirements:
[
  "Author can publish their own Article",
  "Editor can edit any Article",
  "Reader can view published Articles"
]

Generate Cedar schema and policies.

I need authorization rules for a photo sharing app.
Requirements:
[
  "User can view public Albums",
  "User can view their own private Albums",
  "Admin can delete any Album"
]

Turn this into Cedar.

I'm working on a video platform.
Requirements:
[
  "Creator can upload Videos",
  "Creator can delete their own Videos",
  "Subscriber can view subscribed Videos"
]

Produce Cedar schema and policies.

Define access for a forum system.
Requirements:
[
  "User can create Threads",
  "User can reply to Threads",
  "Moderator can delete any Thread"
]

Translate to Cedar.

I'm building a messaging app.
Requirements:
[
  "User can send Messages",
  "User can read Messages in their Conversations",
  "Admin can delete any Message"
]

Generate Cedar.

Authorization rules for a news publishing system.
Requirements:
[
  "Journalist can write Articles",
  "Editor can approve Articles",
  "Reader can view approved Articles"
]

Convert to Cedar.

I'm creating a wiki system.
Requirements:
[
  "Contributor can edit Pages",
  "Reviewer can approve changes",
  "Viewer can read approved Pages"
]

Generate Cedar schema and policies.

Permissions for a podcast platform.
Requirements:

  "Host can upload Episodes",

]

Convert into Cedar.

  "Moderator can review Reports",

  "Admin can assign Moderators"
]

Generate Cedar.

I'm designing a CRM system.
Requirements:
[
  "SalesRep can view assigned Customers",

  "Manager can update Customer records"
]

Produce Cedar.
